programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee: Wardrobe Staples Week
Julia Bradbury's Irish Journey
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury returns to Ireland to rediscover its extraordinary landscapes and fascinating history and culture.Crossing the country from north to south and east to west, he visits both picturesque villages and bustling cities.During her journey, she meets various people who introduce her to Irish everyday life.Julia is actively involved in local activities - she tries her hand at pottery, woodturning, as well as sports such as kayaking and surfing.Thanks to personal experiences and meetings, it shows the richness of tradition and energy of contemporary Ireland, helping viewers look at this country from a new perspective.

programme.title: Born To Be The King
programme.desc: Charles was the longest-serving heir to the throne in history.Finally, after many years, he is crowned.His relatives and colleagues comment on his achievements as Prince of Wales.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Most Luxurious Train Journeys: Scotland
programme.desc: Alan Cumming boards Scotland's luxury trains and shows viewers around their attractions.Before taking a seat in his comfortable cabin, he learns about the amenities he can use.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Most Luxurious Train Journeys: Scotland
programme.desc: Alan Cumming boards Scotland's luxury trains and shows viewers around their attractions.Before taking a seat in his comfortable cabin, he learns about the amenities he can use.

programme.title: Inside Dubai: Playground of the Rich
programme.desc: The luxurious life of millionaires and billionaires living in the tax haven of the United Arab Emirates.The creators of the documentary also present profiles of people who serve as their servants.

programme.title: Inside Dubai: Playground of the Rich
programme.desc: The luxurious life of millionaires and billionaires living in the tax haven of the United Arab Emirates.The creators of the documentary also present profiles of people who serve as their servants.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr renovate a run-down house in southern Spain.During the day, they struggle with renovation difficulties, restoring the building's charm.In the evenings they relax with a glass of sangria.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr renovate a run-down house in southern Spain.During the day, they struggle with renovation difficulties, restoring the building's charm.In the evenings they relax with a glass of sangria.

credits.actor: Self - Host u0026 Narrator - Julia Chan
Self - Host u0026 Narrator - Julia Chan

programme.title: Julia Bradbury's Irish Journey
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury returns to her native Ireland to rediscover its landscapes, history and culture.Traveling throughout the country, he visits both picturesque villages and bustling cities.

programme.title: America's New Female Right
programme.desc: In the USA, there is an increasingly strong group of young women promoting anti-feminist content on social media.Layla Wright talks to representatives of the new political right movement.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programme.desc: Dr. Christian Jessen and his team of doctors help people suffering from rare and very embarrassing diseases.In this series, medics will face really difficult challenges.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programme.desc: Dr. Christian Jessen and his team of doctors help people suffering from rare and very embarrassing diseases.In this series, medics will face really difficult challenges.

programme.title: Inside Dubai: Playground of the Rich
programme.desc: The luxurious life of millionaires and billionaires living in the tax haven of the United Arab Emirates.The creators of the documentary also present profiles of people who serve as their servants.

programme.title: Inside Royal Kensington and Chelsea
programme.desc: The creators invite you for a walk around Knightsbridge, a wealthy street in London, famous for its Victorian mansions and luxury shops and restaurants.The program also includes a visit to Kensington Palace.

programme.title: The Truth About the Skinny Jab
programme.desc: Anna Richardson searches for the truth about the new generation of weight loss drugs.He meets with experts and people who use injections.Explores the black market in counterfeit medicines.

programme.title: What Are We Feeding Our Kids?
programme.desc: The filmmakers look at the struggles of Dr. Chris van Tulleken, who tries to determine the causes of childhood obesity.He suspects that processed food may influence the development of the disease.

programme.title: The First Class Travel Show
programme.desc: Presenter Josie Gibson embarks on a unique adventure during which she experiences the highest levels of comfort and elegance.Her journey is full of exclusive attractions and luxurious amenities.
